checks.description: Detect overlapping occurrences without missing the second detection.
checks.pass_condition: For each overlapping occurrence of the 1001 pattern, sequence_detected must assert high on the cycle after the fourth bit of that occurrence.
checks.trigger_condition: When overlapping pattern bits are presented as defined in plan case edge_001.

checks.pass_condition: sequence_detected must transition from low to high after the fourth bit of a 1001 pattern within a few clock cycles, and remain low for non‑matching input patterns.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 stimulus drives the 1001 bit sequence.

unresolved_items: Golden interface mentioned port 'S4', but it was not found in the RTL header.
Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: -Reset Behavior: When reset is high, the state machine returns to the IDLE state, resetting the detection process.
